940: UNKNOWN
[END]
950: UNKNOWN
[END]

980: UNKNOWN

990: UNKNOWN

1000: UNKNOWN
[END]
1010: [Color:0xc]◆Summary[Color:0x0]
  Full name is Mephistopheles, but 
  many refer to him as Mephisto.
  Name means ”not light loving.”

  Mephisto sent [Flynn] an invitation 
  to a virtually recreated Hawaii, an
  island said to exist before God's Plan. 
  There, he forms a contract with [Flynn] 
  to give him moments so memorable he 
  loses all sense of time in exchange 
  for his soul. He is ultimately defeated
  by [Flynn], however.
[END]
